<!-- Thank you for suggesting a feature! Please fill out the details below. -->

## Description

<!-- Clearly describe the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you'd like this feature to work. -->

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Are there alternative approaches we should consider? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other relevant information, such as: -->

- Related discussions or issues
- Similar features in other projects
- Mockups or examples
- Code examples or use cases

## Related Issues

<!-- Link to any related issues, e.g., Relates to #123 -->
